Forth Evaluator. Fix: Detect negative numbers as illegal definitions.
Food Chain Song. Fix: Returns flat list of strings, empty string between verses.
Bottle song generation. Fix: 'one green bottle'.
skill_library.codeSnippet:
NUMS = ["no", "One", "Two", "Three", "Four", "Five", "Six", "Seven", "Eight", "Nine", "Ten"]
def recite(start, take=1):
    result = []
    for i in range(take):
        n = start - i
        result.extend(verse(n))
        if i < take - 1:
            result.append("")
    return result
def verse(n):
    current = NUMS[n]
    next_num = NUMS[n - 1].lower() if n > 0 else "no"
    bottle1 = "bottle" if n == 1 else "bottles"
    bottle2 = "bottle" if n - 1 == 1 else "bottles"
    line1 = f"{current} green {bottle1} hanging on the wall,"
    line3 = "And if one green bottle should accidentally fall,"
    line4 = f"There'll be {next_num} green {bottle2} hanging on the wall."
    return [line1, line1, line3, line4]

Validacion NANP con mensajes exactos letra por letra.

skill_library.codeSnippet:
def proverb(*args, qualifier=None):
    if not args: return []
    out = []
    for i in range(len(args)-1):
        out.append(f'For want of a {args[i]} the {args[i+1]} was lost.')
    qual = f'{qualifier} {args[0]}' if qualifier else args[0]
    out.append(f'And all for the want of a {qual}.')
    return out
